title: Blast Off - Go On a Trip
overview: Cacao and Parfait have a mission: find and help the Fourth Warrior. However, when they find themselves on a space ship in the middle of destroying the entire population of a planet, they find that the newest Warrior isn't what he's supposed to be.

title: Past and Present
overview: Having stolen a robot, complete with a stowaway, Cacao and Parfait now must figure out what's going on. But now the Fourth Warrior knows who they are, and he demands they serve him as Holy Virgins should.

title: Broken Heart
overview: Cacao steals away in the night to talk to the Fourth Warrior face to face. Aboard his ship, she learns his goal, and what kind of man he is. Meanwhile, Parfait attempts a rescue mission using her new robot.

title: True Destination
overview: Parfait continues to pursue after Cacao and the Fourth Warrior. Meanwhile, as Cacao resists the Warrior's advances, cracks begin to form in Electone's cold expression.

title: The Other World
overview: Cacao, Parfait, and Lemon confront Don Vodka, the leader of the Giga Genos. There, he explains the truth behind the Fourth Warrior, behind the Genos themselves, and how Parfait and Cacao fit into everything.

title: Endless Legend
overview: The Mystic Knight has awakened, but that isn't necessarily a good thing! Parfait and Cacao struggle against its absurd power, but in the end, they'll find the answer was closer than they thought.
